Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cats={}; [cats.update\({r['category']: cats.get\(r['category'],0\)+r['amount']}\) for r in data if r.get\('category',''\).lower\(\)=='shopping']; print\('Shopping total all time:', sum\(cats.values\(\)\)\); shopping=[r for r in data if r.get\('category',''\).lower\(\)=='shopping']; print\('Shopping rows:', len\(shopping\)\); [print\(r['dateTime'][:10], r['amount'], r['item']\) for r in shopping[:5]]")
